name: C & H Pawn Brokers
description_short: C & H Pawn Shop is a pawn broker located in Brooklyn, NY offering collateral-based loans and personal finance services at 181 Knickerbocker Ave.
description_long:
C & H Pawn Shop operates as a pawn broker in the Williamsburg/East Williamsburg area of Brooklyn, New York. The business is established at 181 Knickerbocker Ave Suite A and serves the local community with pawn brokerage services. As a pawn shop, the company facilitates quick access to cash by accepting valuable items as collateral, a common financial service for consumers needing immediate liquidity.

Based on the website listing, C & H Pawn Shop provides pawn brokerage services typical of the industry. The company accepts items of value and provides loans against those collaterals. This service model allows customers to obtain fast cash without credit checks or lengthy approval processes, making it accessible to individuals with various financial backgrounds and credit histories.

The business maintains a local presence with a physical storefront location in Brooklyn, providing in-person service to neighborhood customers. The shop is reachable by phone at (718) 501-0008 for inquiries about services, items accepted, loan terms, and valuations. Their established location in a densely populated New York borough suggests they serve a consistent customer base in the area.

A significant limitation of the available information is that the website listing provides minimal operational detail. The company has not claimed or fully populated their business profile on the directory, leaving specifics about services, hours, accepted items, loan terms, interest rates, and fees undisclosed. Potential customers should contact the business directly to obtain detailed information about their specific offerings, terms, and conditions before engaging their services.
pros: Local brick-and-mortar location in Brooklyn with established physical presence
Direct phone contact available at (718) 501-0008 for customer inquiries
Accessible to residents of Williamsburg and surrounding Brooklyn neighborhoods
No credit check required for pawn loans, making service available to those with poor credit
Fast cash access without lengthy application or approval processes typical of traditional lending
cons: Minimal website information—business profile not claimed or fully populated with service details
No published information about interest rates, fees, loan terms, or item valuations
No transparency on hours of operation, accepted collateral types, or loan limits
Limited online presence and digital engagement tools for prospective customers
No customer reviews or testimonials available on the listing to assess service quality
best_for: Consumers in Brooklyn needing immediate cash and willing to pledge collateral
Individuals with poor or no credit history seeking loans without credit checks
People looking to pawn jewelry, electronics, or other valuables locally
diagnosis: C & H Pawn Shop is best for Brooklyn residents needing immediate cash who have valuable items to pledge as collateral and prefer avoiding credit checks. The main caveat is the lack of published information about terms, fees, and rates—customers must contact the shop directly to understand loan specifics and valuations before transacting.
services: Cash advances secured by valuable items
